rationale: This archetype is a hard mismatch for Flappy Dunk: the muted earth-tone palette (navy/burnt orange/forest green) and architectural cross-section animation directly contradict the game's flat 2D cartoon style with vibrant magenta/beige/blue and a tappable avatar. There is also no plausible bridge from "secret bunker reveal" to a tap-timing hoop-scoring loop, so any attempt would feel bait-and-switch and likely tank IPM despite the curiosity hook's broad appeal. Skip this archetype unless we're testing a deliberate misdirection meta-creative, and even then the cluster has only 1 ad / 1 advertiser — too thin a signal to justify production spend.
